name: Pi Builder
description: Scaffolding & package builder for Pi ecosystem. Self-hostable, extensible code generator.

stories.title: Initialize Pi Builder monorepo structure
stories.description: Set up pnpm workspace with core packages (@pi-builder/cli, @pi-builder/core, @pi-builder/templates)
acceptance: Three package dirs created (cli, core, templates)

stories.title: Create @pi-builder/core package
stories.description: Core module for template parsing, file generation, context management
acceptance: Package structure: src/, dist/, package.json, tsconfig.json
npm run build && npm run test pass

stories.title: Create @pi-builder/cli package
stories.description: Command-line interface for scaffolding projects

stories.title: Create @pi-builder/templates package
stories.description: Default templates (pi-app, pi-skill, pi-extension, pi-api)

stories.title: Implement TemplateEngine in @pi-builder/core
stories.description: Parse template.json, validate variables, handle conditional blocks

stories.title: Implement FileGenerator in @pi-builder/core
stories.description: Create files/dirs from template output, handle binary files
acceptance: Write text files with interpolated content

stories.title: Implement ContextBuilder in @pi-builder/core
stories.description: Gather user input, validate, build template context

stories.title: Implement 'pi-builder init' command
stories.description: Interactive project initialization - ask questions, generate scaffold
acceptance: Prompt for project name, description, template

stories.title: Implement 'pi-builder generate' command
stories.description: Generate code/files from template into existing project
acceptance: Merge with existing files (no overwrite by default)

stories.title: Implement 'pi-builder list' command
stories.description: List available templates with descriptions

stories.title: Add pi-app template (basic Pi app skeleton)
stories.description: Template for creating a new Pi application project
acceptance: template.json with variables: name, description, author, version
Scaffold: src/, tests/, dist/, package.json, README.md, tsconfig.json

stories.title: Add pi-skill template
stories.description: Template for creating a new Pi skill (extension point)
acceptance: template.json with variables: name, description, skillType

stories.title: Add pi-extension template
stories.description: Template for creating a Pi extension (tools, commands)

stories.title: Add pi-api template
stories.description: Template for REST/GraphQL API projects using Pi

stories.title: Add package discovery system
stories.description: Allow registering custom templates from external packages

stories.title: Implement config file support (.pi-builder.json)
stories.description: Store generator preferences, custom templates, defaults
acceptance: Load .pi-builder.json from project root / home dir
Merge with CLI flags (flags > config > defaults)

stories.title: Add TypeScript support + type generation
stories.description: Auto-generate type definitions for templates from schema

stories.title: Build plugin system for custom generators
stories.description: Allow extending pi-builder with custom generation hooks

stories.title: Add validation & linting for templates
stories.description: Command to validate template definitions + generated output

stories.title: Implement local development server (pi-builder dev)
stories.description: Watch templates, rebuild, reload - for template developers
acceptance: Serve test page with template preview

stories.title: Add integration tests (e2e templates)
stories.description: Generate full projects, verify they build + run
acceptance: E2E test: init → pnpm install → pnpm build → pnpm test

stories.title: Write comprehensive CLI documentation
stories.description: README, API docs, template authoring guide

stories.title: Set up GitHub Actions CI/CD
stories.description: Lint, test, build, publish pipeline

stories.title: Prepare for self-hosting (OpenClaw deployment)
stories.description: Docker image, deploy docs, environment setup
